title: About Me
intro: Computer Science Engineer with experience in data science and systems development. I lead teams toward clear objectives and thrive in dynamic environments applying technical expertise to solve new challenges

mindset.title: Engineering Mindset
mindset.description: Design systems by understanding problems deeply before writing a single line of code. Every system starts with clarity on constraints, trade-offs, and long-term maintainability

leadership.title: Leadership
leadership.description: Leading through technical excellence and mentorship. I help teams ship high-quality software by fostering a culture of code reviews, knowledge sharing, and continuous improvement

systems.title: Systems Thinking
systems.description: Designing with the big picture in mind. I consider how components interact, where bottlenecks emerge, and how systems evolve over time
